overrides.expect: g _ {n} (\varepsilon) d \varepsilon = (2 / V) \times \begin{array}{l} \text {(the number of allowed wave vectors} \\ \text {in the nth band in the energy range} \\ \text {from \varepsilon to \varepsilon + d\varepsilon).} \end{array} \tag {8.58}
overrides.new: g_n(\varepsilon)\,d\varepsilon = (2 / V)\times \begin{array}{l} \text{(the number of allowed wave vectors} \\ \text{in the nth band in the energy range} \\ \text{from } \varepsilon \text{ to } \varepsilon + d\varepsilon). \end{array} \tag{8.58}

overrides.expect: \boxed  \begin{array}{l} D _ {n} \frac {d ^ {2} n _ {c}}{d x ^ {2}} = \frac {n _ {c} - n _ {c} ^ {0}}{\tau_ {n}}, \\ D _ {p} \frac {d ^ {2} p _ {v}}{d x ^ {2}} = \frac {p _ {v} - p _ {v} ^ {0}}{\tau_ {p}}. \end{array} (E \approx 0) \tag {29.36}
overrides.new: \boxed{\begin{array}{l} D_n \frac{d^{2} n_c}{d x^{2}}=\frac{n_c - n_c^{0}}{\tau_n},\\ D_p \frac{d^{2} p_v}{d x^{2}}=\frac{p_v - p_v^{0}}{\tau_p}. \end{array}} (E\approx 0) \tag{29.36}
